theorem abs_w_i_eq_k {u v : V} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) : ∑(e : edgeSet p),
    edgeCount p e = p.length := by sorry

lemma vertex_edge_inequality {u v : V} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) :
  (supportSet p).card ≤ (edgeSet p).card +1 := by sorry

def graphWalkMultiIndex {n k : ℕ} (hk : k > 0) (I : (Fin k) → Fin n):
    ((K n).LoopWalk (I ⟨0, hk⟩) (I ⟨0, hk⟩)) := by sorry

def permMapWalk (s : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) (p : (K n).LoopWalk u v) : (K n).LoopWalk (s u) (s v):= by
  p.map (permMap' n s)

@[simp]
lemma permMapWalk_nil (s : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) (u : Fin n) :
  permMapWalk n s (LoopWalk.nil : (K n).LoopWalk u u) = LoopWalk.nil := rfl

@[simp]
lemma permMapWalk_cons (s : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
  {u v w : Fin n} (h : (K n).Adj u v) (p : (K n).LoopWalk v w) :
  permMapWalk n s (LoopWalk.cons h p)
    = LoopWalk.cons ((permMap n s).map_adj h) (permMapWalk n s p) := rfl

@[simp]
lemma permMapWalk_loop (s : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
  {u v : Fin n} (p : (K n).LoopWalk u v) :
  permMapWalk n s (LoopWalk.loop p) = LoopWalk.loop (permMapWalk n s p) := rfl

@[simp]
lemma permMapWalk_refl (p : (K n).LoopWalk u v) :
  permMapWalk n (Equiv.refl (Fin n)) p = p := by
  classical
  induction p with
  | nil =>
    simp
  | @cons u v w h p ih =>
    have h_adj_eq : (permMap n (Equiv.refl (Fin n))).map_adj h = h := by
      apply Subsingleton.elim
    simpa [h_adj_eq, ih]
  | @loop u v p ih =>
    simpa [ih]

@[simp]
lemma permMapWalk_comp (t s : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
  (p : (K n).LoopWalk u v) :
  permMapWalk n t (permMapWalk n s p) = permMapWalk n (t * s) p := by
  classical
  induction p with
  | nil =>
    simp
  | @cons u v w h p ih =>
    have h_adj_eq :
        (permMap n t).map_adj ((permMap n s).map_adj h)
        = (permMap n (t * s)).map_adj h := by
      apply Subsingleton.elim
    simp [ih]
  | @loop u v p ih =>
    simp [ih]

@[simp]
lemma perm_symm_mul_self (s : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) :
  s.symm * s = (Equiv.refl (Fin n)) := by
  ext x
  simp [Equiv.Perm.mul_def]

@[simp]
lemma perm_self_mul_symm (s : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) :
  s * s.symm = (Equiv.refl (Fin n)) := by
  ext x
  simp [Equiv.Perm.mul_def]

def LoopWalkEquiv (p q : ClosedLoopWalk (K n)): Prop :=
  ∃ (s : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)),
    q = ⟨s p.1, permMapWalk n s p.2⟩

def LoopWalkEquiv' (p q : ClosedLoopWalk (K n)): Prop :=
  ∃ (s : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)), ∃ (h_eq : s p.1 = q.1),
    h_eq ▸ (permMapWalk n s p.2) = q.2

/-- The two definitions are equal. -/
example: LoopWalkEquiv = LoopWalkEquiv' := by
 ext n w1 w2
 exact ⟨fun ⟨eq,hlw1⟩ ↦ ⟨eq, by rw [hlw1]; simp⟩,
   fun ⟨eq,hlw1',hlw2'⟩ ↦ ⟨eq,by ext <;> simp [hlw1']; rw [←hlw2']; simp⟩⟩

def LoopWalkSetoid : Setoid (ClosedLoopWalk (K n)) where
  r := LoopWalkEquiv n
  iseqv := by
    constructor
    · intro x
      classical
      rcases x with ⟨ux, px⟩
      refine ⟨Equiv.refl (Fin n), ?_⟩
      ext
      · simp
      · simp [permMapWalk_refl]
    · intro x y hxy
      classical
      rcases x with ⟨ux, px⟩
      rcases y with ⟨uy, py⟩
      rcases hxy with ⟨s, hy⟩
      refine ⟨s.symm, ?_⟩
      <;>
      (try cases hy <;>
        simp_all [permMapWalk_comp, perm_symm_mul_self, permMapWalk_refl, Equiv.ext_iff] <;>
        try { aesop }) <;>
      (try {
        ext <;>
        simp_all [permMapWalk_comp, perm_symm_mul_self, permMapWalk_refl, Equiv.ext_iff] <;>
        try { aesop }
      }) <;>
      (try {
        aesop
      })
    <;>
    (try {
      aesop
    })

    edgeCount p e = p.length := by sorry

lemma vertex_edge_inequality {u v : V} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) :
  (supportSet p).card ≤ (edgeSet p).card +1 := by sorry

def graphWalkMultiIndex {n k : ℕ} (hk : k > 0) (I : (Fin k) → Fin n):
    ((K n).LoopWalk (I ⟨0, hk⟩) (I ⟨0, hk⟩)) := by sorry

def permMapWalk (s : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) (p : (K n).LoopWalk u v) : (K n).LoopWalk (s u) (s v):= by
  p.map (permMap' n s)

@[simp]
lemma permMapWalk_nil (s : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) (u : Fin n) :
  permMapWalk n s (LoopWalk.nil : (K n).LoopWalk u u) = LoopWalk.nil := rfl

@[simp]
lemma permMapWalk_cons (s : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
  {u v w : Fin n} (h : (K n).Adj u v) (p : (K n).LoopWalk v w) :
  permMapWalk n s (LoopWalk.cons h p)
    = LoopWalk.cons ((permMap n s).map_adj h) (permMapWalk n s p) := rfl

@[simp]
lemma permMapWalk_loop (s : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
  {u v : Fin n} (p : (K n).LoopWalk u v) :
  permMapWalk n s (LoopWalk.loop p) = LoopWalk.loop (permMapWalk n s p) := rfl

```lean
def LoopWalkEquiv (p q : ClosedLoopWalk (K n)): Prop :=
  ∃ (s : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)),
    q = ⟨s p.1, permMapWalk n s p.2⟩

def LoopWalkEquiv' (p q : ClosedLoopWalk (K n)): Prop :=
  ∃ (s : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)), ∃ (h_eq : s p.1 = q.1),
    h_eq ▸ (permMapWalk n s p.2) = q.2

/-- The two definition are equal. -/
example: LoopWalkEquiv = LoopWalkEquiv' := by
 ext n w1 w2
 exact ⟨fun ⟨eq,hlw1⟩ ↦ ⟨eq, by rw [hlw1]; simp⟩,
   fun ⟨eq,hlw1',hlw2'⟩ ↦ ⟨eq,by ext <;> simp [hlw1']; rw [←hlw2']; simp⟩⟩

def LoopWalkSetoid : Setoid (ClosedLoopWalk (K n)) where
  r := LoopWalkEquiv n
  iseqv := by
    constructor
    · intro x
      classical
      rcases x with ⟨ux, px⟩
      refine ⟨Equiv.refl (Fin n), ?_⟩
      ext
      · simp
      · simp [permMapWalk_refl]
    · intro x y hxy
      classical
      rcases x with ⟨ux, px⟩
      rcases y with ⟨uy, py⟩
      rcases hxy with ⟨s, hy⟩
      refine ⟨s.symm, ?_⟩
      cases hy
      simp [permMapWalk_comp, perm_symm_mul_self, permMapWalk_refl]
      <;> congr 1 <;>
      (try simp_all [Equiv.Perm.mul_def, Fin.ext_iff]) <;>
      (try ext <;> simp_all [Equiv.Perm.mul_def, Fin.ext_iff]) <;>
      (try aesop)
    · intro x y z hxy hyz
      classical
      rcases x with ⟨ux, px⟩
      rcases y with ⟨uy, py⟩
      rcases z with ⟨uz, pz⟩
      simp only [LoopWalkEquiv] at hxy hyz ⊢
      obtain ⟨s, hs⟩ := hxy
      obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := hyz
      refine' ⟨t.trans s, _⟩
      simp_all [Perm_equiv.equiv_eq_symm, Equiv.trans, Equiv.mul_eq_comp, permMapWalk_comp]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [Equiv.Perm.mul_def, Fin.ext_iff]) <;>
      (try ext <;> simp_all [Equiv.Perm.mul_def, Fin.ext_iff]) <;>
      (try aesop)
  <;>
  aesop

def LoopWalkEquiv (p q : ClosedLoopWalk (K n)): Prop :=
  ∃ (s : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)),
    q = ⟨s p.1, permMapWalk n s p.2⟩

def LoopWalkEquiv' (p q : ClosedLoopWalk (K n)): Prop :=
  ∃ (s : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)), ∃ (h_eq : s p.1 = q.1),
    h_eq ▸ (permMapWalk n s p.2) = q.2

/-- The two definition are equal. -/
example: LoopWalkEquiv = LoopWalkEquiv' := by
 ext n w1 w2
 exact ⟨fun ⟨eq,hlw1⟩ ↦ ⟨eq, by rw [hlw1]; simp⟩,
   fun ⟨eq,hlw1',hlw2'⟩ ↦ ⟨eq,by ext <;> simp [hlw1']; rw [←hlw2']; simp⟩⟩

def LoopWalkSetoid : Setoid (ClosedLoopWalk (K n)) where
  r := LoopWalkEquiv n
  iseqv := by
    constructor
    · intro x
      classical
      rcases x with ⟨ux, px⟩
      refine ⟨Equiv.refl (Fin n), ?_⟩
      ext
      · simp
      · simp [permMapWalk_refl]
    · intro x y hxy
      classical
      rcases x with ⟨ux, px⟩
      rcases y with ⟨uy, py⟩
      rcases hxy with ⟨s, hy⟩
      refine ⟨s.symm, ?_⟩
      cases hy
      simp [permMapWalk_comp, perm_symm_mul_self, permMapWalk_refl]
      <;> congr 1 <;>
      (try simp_all [Equiv.Perm.mul_def, Fin.ext_iff]) <;>
      (try ext <;> simp_all [Equiv

<;>
      (try simp_all [permMap, permMap', K]) <;>
      (try simp_all [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.append, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.nil_append, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.append_nil]) <;>
      (try aesop)

<;>
      aesop
    rw [h₆]
    have h₇ : ∑ (e : Sym2 V) in ((p.darts.map (fun (x : V × V) => Sym2.mk x.1 x.2)).toFinset : Finset (Sym2 V)), (count (fun (x : V × V) => e = Sym2.mk x.1 x.2) p.darts) = p.darts.length := h₁ p.darts
    rw [h₇]
  rw [h₃]
  have h₄ : p.length = p.darts.length := by
    have h₅ : ∀ {u v : V} (p : LoopWalk G u v), p.length = p.darts.length := by
      intro u v p
      induction p with
      | nil => simp
      | cons h q =>
        simp_all [length, darts, List.length]
        <;>
        simp_all [Nat.succ_eq_add_one, add_assoc]
        <;>
        ring_nf at *
        <;>
        simp_all

s) px = permMapWalk n 1 px := by ...
have h₃ : permMapWalk n 1 px = px := by ...
have h₄ : permMapWalk n s.symm (permMapWalk n s px) = px := by ...
simp_all [h₄]

<;>
      (try simp_all) <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [permMapWalk_comp, perm_symm_mul_self, permMapWalk_refl]
          <;>
          aesop
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [permMapWalk_comp, perm_symm_mul_self, permMapWalk_refl]
          <;>
          congr 1 <;>
          ext <;>
          simp_all [Equiv.Perm.mul_apply] <;>
          aesop
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [permMapWalk_comp, perm_symm_mul_self, permMapWalk_refl]
          <;>
          congr 1 <;>
          ext <;>
          simp_all [Equiv.Perm.mul_apply] <;>
          aesop
        })

_ = ∑ (e : edgeSet p), p.edges.countP (· = e) := by
            simp [Finset.sum_congr]
          _ = ∑ (e : edgeSet p), (p.edges.countP (· = e)) := by rfl
          _ = ∑ (e : p.edges.toFinset), (p.edges.countP (· = e)) := by
            simp [edgeSet]
            <;>
            rfl
          _ = p.edges.countL (fun x => True) := by
            have h₄ : ∑ (e : p.edges.toFinset), p.edges.countP (· = e) = p.edges.countL (fun x => True) := by
              calc
                _ = ∑ (e : p.edges.toFinset), p.edges.countP (· = e) := by rfl
                _ = ∑ (e : p.edges.toFinset), p.edges.count e := by
                  simp [List.countP]
                  <;>
                  simp_all [List.count_eq_countP]
                  <;>
                  rfl
                _ = p.edges.countL (fun x => True) := by
                  simp [List.countL]
                  <;>
                  simp_all [List.count_eq_countP]
                  <;>
                  rfl
            simp_all [edgeSet]
            <;>
            rfl
      have h₅ : p.edges.countL (fun x => True) = p.length := by
        have h₆ : p.edges.length = p.length := by
          -- We need to prove that the length of the edges list is equal to the length of the walk.
          -- This is true because each step in the walk corresponds to an edge in the edges list.
          have h₇ : ∀ (p : G.LoopWalk u v), p.edges.length = p.length := by
            intro p
            induction p with
            | nil =>
              simp [edges, darts]
            | cons h p ih =>
              simp_all [edges, darts, List.length]
              <;>
              simp_all [G.LoopWalk.length]
              <;>
              rfl
            | loop p ih =>
              simp_all [edges, darts, List.length]
              <;>
              simp_all [G.LoopWalk.length]
              <;>
              rfl
          exact h₇ p
        have h₈ : p.edges.countL (fun x => True) = p.edges.length := by
          simp [List.countL]
          <;>
          simp_all [List.count_eq_countP]
          <;>
          rfl
        linarith
      linarith
    exact h₂
  exact h₁ p
  <;>
  simp_all
  <;>
  rfl

      <;> try simp_all [permMap_walk_symm]
      <;> try simp_all [perm_map_symm]
      <;> try simp_all [inv_mul_cancel]
      <;> try simp_all [cycle_mul_eq]
